since_last: 58% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.08%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.10% · BTC +0.38% · Gold +1.17% · Nasdaq100 +0.53%. 58% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.08%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.08%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +7.26%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +7.26%, SMR +7.08%, ARM +7.03%, VRT +7.02%, ASML +6.91%. Laggards: APP -4.33%, SNAP -3.29%, META -3.18%, AI -2.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.30% at $197.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.30% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
